title: Glistaweb
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Glistaweb''' was a fabric of clothing used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Glistaweb had a shimmering, glowing appearance due to a charge-neutralizing field generated along it. Glistaweb was capable of deflecting [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire, much like [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|vonduun crab armor]], but was mostly used as special dress for important ceremonies. [[Nom Anor]] also wore a cloak of this material when he addressed the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]], and escaped harm solely due to its blaster reflective properties.

When the [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet]] was sent to [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|attack]] [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], the capital of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] and [[Elite (Yuuzhan Vong)|his court]] (including [[Onimi]]) were dressed in glistaweb to send off the fleet.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
